{
  "analysis": "Headers created. Now need linker script and Makefile to build the MIPS ELF. Also need to handle the math.h and stdint.h/stdarg.h/stddef.h includes - those can come from the cross-compiler's system includes since they're just type definitions.",
  "plan": "Create linker script, Makefile, and build the binary.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "cat > /app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/mips.ld << 'EOF'\nOUTPUT_FORMAT(\"elf32-l

mipsel-linux-gnu-gcc
CFLAGS = -EL -march=mips32 -mabi=32 -fno-builtin -ffreestanding -nostdinc -nostdlib -O2 -g \
  -I. -Iinclude -DNORMALUNIX -DLINUX -DSNDSERV -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE
LDFLAGS = -EL -melf32ltsmips -T mips.ld -nostdlib

OUTPUT = doomgeneric_mips

SRC = dummy.o am_map.o doomdef.o doomstat.o dstrings.o d_event.o d_items.o d_iwad.o d_loop.o \

d_main.o d_mode.o d_net.o f_finale.o f_wipe.o g_game.o hu_lib.o hu_stuff.o info.o \\\n  i_cdmus.o i_endoom.o i_joystick.o i_scale.o i_sound.o i_system.o i_timer.o memio.o \\\n  m_argv.o m_bbox.o m_cheat.o m_config.o m_controls.o m_fixed.o m_menu.o m_misc.o \\\n  m_random.o p_ceilng.o p_doors.o p_enemy.o p_floor.o p_inter.o p_lights.o p_map.o \\\n  p_maputl.o p_mobj.o p_plats.o p_pspr.o p_saveg.o p_setup.o p_sight.o p_spec.o \\\n  p_switch.o p_telept.o p_tick

.o p_user.o r_bsp.o r_data.o r_draw.o r_main.o r_plane.o \
  r_segs.o r_sky.o r_things.o sha1.o sounds.o statdump.o st_lib.o st_stuff.o s_sound.o \

detail.visible_answer:
{
  "analysis": "Headers created. Now need linker script and Makefile to build the MIPS ELF. Also need to handle the math.h and stdint.h/stdarg.h/stddef.h includes - those can come from the cross-compiler's system includes since they're just type definitions.",
  "plan": "Create linker script, Makefile, and build the binary.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "cat > /app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/mips.ld << 'EOF'
OUTPUT_FORMAT("elf32-littlemips")
ENTRY(main)
SECTIONS
{
  . = 0x400000;
  .text : { *(.text.startup) *(.text*) }
  .rodata : { *(.rodata*) }
  .data : { *(.data*) }
  .bss : { *(.bss*) *(COMMON)
    . = ALIGN(16);
    _end = .;
  }
}
EOF
", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "cat > /app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/Makefile.mips << 'EOF'
CC = mipsel-linux-gnu-gcc
CFLAGS = -EL -march=mips32 -mabi=32 -fno-builtin -ffreestanding -nostdinc -nostdlib -O2 -g \
  -I. -Iinclude -DNORMALUNIX -DLINUX -DSNDSERV -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE
LDFLAGS = -EL -melf32ltsmips -T mips.ld -nostdlib

OUTPUT = doomgeneric_mips

SRC = dummy.o am_map.o doomdef.o doomstat.o dstrings.o d_event.o d_items.o d_iwad.o d_loop.o \
  d_main.o d_mode.o d_net.o f_finale.o f_wipe.o g_game.o hu_lib.o hu_stuff.o info.o \
  i_cdmus.o i_endoom.o i_joystick.o i_scale.o i_sound.o i_system.o i_timer.o memio.o \
  m_argv.o m_bbox.o m_cheat.o m_config.o m_controls.o m_fixed.o m_menu.o m_misc.o \
  m_random.o p_ceilng.o p_doors.o p_enemy.o p_floor.o p_inter.o p_lights.o p_map.o \
  p_maputl.o p_mobj.o p_plats.o p_pspr.o p_saveg.o p_setup.o p_sight.o p_spec.o \
  p_switch.o p_telept.o p_tick.o p_user.o r_bsp.o r_data.o r_draw.o r_main.o r_plane.o \
  r_segs.o r_sky.o r_things.o sha1.o sounds.o statdump.o st_lib.o st_stuff.o s_sound.o \
  tables.o v_video.o wi_stuff.o w_checksum.o w_file.o w_main.o w_wad.o z_zone.o \
  w_file_stdc.o i_input.o i_video.o doomgeneric.o doomgeneric_img.o my_stdlib.o

all: $(OUTPUT)

$(OUTPUT): $(SRC)
	$(CC) $(LDFLAGS) $^ -lgcc -o $@

%.o: %.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -c $< -o $@

clean:
	rm -f $(OUTPUT) *.o
EOF
", "duration": 0.1},
    {"keystrokes": "cd /app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric && make -f Makefile.mips clean 2>&1 | tail -5
", "duration": 1.0}
  ]
}
